The '''Inglenook''' was an annex of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Palace of the Republic]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. A spot for [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and other aquatic species serving in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to relax, the Inglenook was located directly on the [[Glitannai Esplanade]]. Remaining open during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Inglenook was still a functioning part of the Palace under [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] rule when the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invaded]] the world. It was destroyed during the following [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] of the planet by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==History==
The [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] Inglenook was an annex of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Palace of the Republic]] built sometime during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Resembling a giant coral reef, the [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] walls of the massive spa allowed natural light to spill into the building and create a relaxing retreat for aquatic species who worked at the Palace or in the government elsewhere on Coruscant.<ref name="CATCW" />

Following the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] allowed for the Inglenook to remain opened, using it as an exclusive spa for his Imperial minions. When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|seized]] the planet and ousted the Imperials following the death of Palpatine, the Palace and the Inglenook were taken for Republic use. The Inglenook remained open until [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] when it was destroyed during the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]]'s [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion]] of the planet.<ref name="TUF" />
